name: @chart-studio/root
description: Multi-provider charting platform — separate app, designed to be extracted into its own repo.

scripts.build: npm run -w @chart-studio/adapter-core build && npm run -w @chart-studio/indicator-runtime build && npm run -w @chart-studio/gateway build && npm run -w @chart-studio/adapter-binance build && npm run -w @chart-studio/adapter-dhanhq build
